notes: Starts but crashes before the main menu.
title: Midair

notes: I would say overall just playable. I believe I need to do some tweaking my radeon 7 so it's not constantly throttling and getting stutters. Some maps do performance much better than others, but seeing that this was the case on windows (minora in particular) I wouldn't expect anything else on Linux either. Weird graphical LOD black flickering glitch on some bases and out of bounds grids never fade.
title: Midair

notes:
Install and make sure dxvk is working. You may need specific packages for your system, google dxvk + your distro. Use wine staging as well to get esync patches. Performance is pretty much perfect, I'd say I have about ~90% the performance I have on windows with the card. Game stutters slightly more on than on windows especially during the first minute as shaders get compiled but overall the performance is really impressive for a translation layer. The game stutters even on windows anyway so... Some maps do worse than others, main offend is minora, but that has had poor performance for ages.

Use my autoexec to get more performance https://forums.playmidair.com/threads/fyrs-midair-configuration-thread.944/
title: Midair

notes: Working perfectly out of the box.
title: Midair
